name: UNIVERSAL SAFETY PRODUCTS, INC.
summary: Universal Safety Products, Inc. (formerly Universal Security Instruments, Inc.) designs and markets popularly priced safety products including smoke alarms, carbon monoxide alarms, door chimes, ventilation products, GFCIs, and other electrical devices. Products are imported primarily from China and sold through retail stores and the electrical distribution trade via its subsidiary Universal Safety Electric, Inc. In May 2025, the company sold its smoke and carbon monoxide alarm business to Feit Electric Company, Inc.

products.name: Smoke Alarms
products.description: Residential smoke alarms under UNIVERSAL and USI Electric trade names, battery or 120V powered, manufactured by Eyston in China.

products.name: Carbon Monoxide Alarms
products.description: Residential CO alarms marketed under UNIVERSAL and USI Electric brands, manufactured by Eyston in China.

products.name: Door Chimes
products.description: Door chime products marketed alongside safety alarms.

products.name: Ventilation Products
products.description: Ventilation products sold through retail and electrical distribution channels.

products.name: Ground Fault Circuit Interrupters (GFCIs)
products.description: GFCIs and other electrical devices marketed to retail and electrical distribution trade.

products.name: Hearing Impaired and Heat Alarms
products.description: Specialty smoke alarms for hearing impaired and heat detection, sold to electrical distribution trade.

partnerships.description: Principal supplier manufacturing substantially all safety products in the PRC; accounted for ~96.3% of purchases in fiscal 2025.
Acquired the smoke and carbon monoxide alarm business and non-tangible assets of the Company; deal closed May 22, 2025.
